title: Godrej Interio is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Interio is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
